normalized_title: Statement of Planning Policy No. 3: Urban Growth and Settlement
version_date: Gazetted 17 March 2006 (Government Gazette No. 46; policy dated February 2006)
scope_summary: Broad sector policy made under section 5AA of the Town Planning and Development Act 1928 setting out the principles for planning urban growth and settlement across Western Australia. It promotes sustainable communities, urban consolidation, liveable neighbourhoods, coordination of services and infrastructure, managed rural-residential growth and planning for Aboriginal communities. It applies state-wide and is to be taken into account in preparing regional and local planning strategies, planning schemes and amendments, and given weight in statutory decision-making; it operates at the strategic level rather than prescribing development standards for individual applications.
